subagents.finding: Recommended exact-name aliases plus evidence gates for the remaining 421 missing metric unit-family rows.

subagents.name: Dirac
subagents.finding: Current route/project validator-style duplicate_global_identity backlog is zero; no high-confidence merge alias or DNM guard is needed now.

implemented_metric_changes.summary: Added exact-name metric unit inference for YTD payment/adjudication/violation/train-lateness variants, state-tax refund money variants, daily bus ridership variants, complaint total variants, workforce total variants, daily vehicle volume, participation, and ranking rows.

Added exact-name inference for locomotive counts, track trespassing incidents, audit/project completions, revenue/cost money rows, annual money-rate rows, TOS arrest/summons rows, complaint rows, reportable injuries, injured/killed population rows, crime count rows, subway fires, miscellaneous object counts, percent-change rows, ridership rows, and net workforce change by sex.

Added gated safety-event inference requiring evidence outside metric_name for derailments, collisions, injuries, and fires; added annual money-rate inference requiring money evidence; retained no-overwrite and finite-value requirements.
Added representative tests for the new exact names and negative guards for raw-only derailments and money names without money evidence.

remaining_target_missing.reason: Gated safety-event rule intentionally requires derailment evidence outside metric_name; raw-only numeric row remains unresolved.
Gated safety-event rule intentionally requires fire evidence outside metric_name; raw-only numeric row remains unresolved.

advisory_noisy_edges.note: Explorer reported no open edges after DNM; the noisy edge examples are already DNM-suppressed false positives.

route_project_identity_audit.implementation_decision: No route/project merge alias, DNM guard, or identity-key edit was applied because the current validator-style route/project duplicate backlog is zero.

commands.result: Materialized 93067/98115 submissions; retired submissions skipped 265; Pages 7335; SQLite FTS quick_check ok
Issues: 0; Submissions 98115; Canonical records 84027; Wiki pages 7331

remaining_deferrals: crash_injuries has same-name conflicts between people, crashes, fatalities, and safety units.
Secondary Screening Score / Bell-Curve Grade Threshold need a score/rating policy before normalization.
Broad ridership rows mix riders, rides, trips, boardings, and scale examples.
Lost Time Incident Rate / LTIR need a dedicated rate-family rule.
Major felony / arrest / hate crime change rows retain change-count versus percent ambiguity.
Vacancies and bare headcount/FTE variants need a bounded workforce policy.
Current route/project validator-style duplicate backlog is zero; next identity work should target advisory-edge generation only if it produces a measurable noisy bucket.
next_lanes: Continue metric missing unit-family tail from 294, starting with score/rating policy or LTIR rate policy if high-confidence.
Audit remaining singletons for exact names with obvious object units, but keep broad ridership/crash injury/change metrics deferred.
If returning to identity, target advisory edge generation rules rather than merge/DNM overrides, because route/project duplicate backlog is currently zero.
